_translatorNote: Best-effort Kinyarwanda translations. Brand names (The Mall IWACU, Iwacu, menu item brand names) are kept as-is. Please review and refine — anything that feels off can be edited here without touching code.

common.pricesMayVary: Ibiciro birashobora guhinduka. Amafoto ni urugero gusa. Ibicuruzwa byose biri mu rwego rw'ubuhabwa.

hero.subtitle: Aho mukundira muri kariya gace — kurya, kunywa, kugura, kuruhuka. Ibyangombwa, akabari, igikoni, na massage ndetse n'umwuka mushyushye — byose mu nzu imwe.

services.heading: Ibyo umunsi wawe ukeneye byose — mu nzu imwe.
services.intro: The Mall IWACU ni inguni aho ibyo gukora, amafunguro, ibinyobwa n'ikiruhuko bihurira. Hitamo umuryango.

groceries.title: Ibyangombwa
groceries.description: Ibyangombwa bya buri munsi, imbuto n'imboga, n'ibibikwa mu gikoni — guhagarara byihuse, ibiciro bishyizweho, serivisi y'umuturanyi.

bar.title: Akabari
bar.description: Inzoga zikonje zo mu Rwanda, ibinyobwa byoroshye, divayi na cocktail ya buri munsi — uburyo bworoshye bwo kuruhuka.

kitchen.title: Igikoni
kitchen.description: Amafunguro y'i Rwanda atetse iwacu, brochettes, tilapia, na buffet ya buri munsi — ibiribwa bishyushye.

spa.title: Massage n'Umwuka
spa.description: Massage y'umubiri wose, reflexology, umwuka w'ibyatsi — ihohotere, hagarara, wihagararire iruhande.

bar.label: Mu Bari
bar.caption: Inzoga zikonje & cocktail ya buri munsi

whyUs.heading: Aho dukundira muri agace — kuri buri munsi.
whyUs.lead: Iwacu bivuga "mu rugo," niyo myumvire dushaka — aho munyura mu miryango yacu, ugomba kuyumva mu kanya wageze.

community.title: Umuryango Mbere
community.body: Twubatswe ku baturanyi bacu. Imiranga isanzwe, serivisi y'ubucuti, ibiganiro by'ukuri.

quality.title: Ubwiza Ushobora Kumva
quality.body: Kuva ku ngufu zifite imbaraga zo kunywa kandi imibereho — ubwiza ni cyo cyiciro kimwe rukumbi tuzi.

convenience.title: Byose mu Hamwe
convenience.body: Serivisi enye, inzu imwe ishyushye. Hagarara incuro imwe, usohoke n'ibyo wose wakeneye.

location.title: Iruhande
location.body: Byoroshye gusanga mu Kabeza — hafi cyane kugeza tukaba ari igice cy'ubuzima bwa buri munsi.

testimonials.heading: Bavuga abaturanyi bacu tugaburirwa, tunywesha n'imitse.
testimonials.intro: Amagambo make ava ku bakiriya basanzwe. Wifuza kongeraho ayawe? Twandikire kuri WhatsApp nyuma yo gusura kwawe.

footer.blurb: Aho mukundira muri Kabeza, Kicukiro — kurya, kunywa, kugura, kuruhuka. Byose mu nzu imwe.

menu.title: Menu.
menu.subtitle: Kanda igice. Shaka ikintu. Ibiciro mu RWF.

book.title: Saba igihe.
book.subtitle: Intambwe enye. Igihe utangira n'irangiriro biva ku serivisi uhitamo. Tuzakwemeza kuri WhatsApp.

step1.title: Hitamo serivisi yawe
step1.subtitle: Buri serivisi ifite igihe cyayo. Hitamo imwe urebe amasaha.

step2.title: Hitamo itariki
step2.subtitle: Gufata bishoboka kugeza ku minsi {days} imbere.

step3.title: Hitamo isaha
step3.noTimes: Nta masaha aboneka — gerageza undi munsi.

step4.title: Amakuru yawe
step4.subtitle: Twemeza igihe cyo gufata kuri WhatsApp. Ongeraho icyitonderwa niba ufite.
step4.name: Izina
step4.hold: Igihe cyawe cyizigamiwe mu busage bwawe mu masaha 24. Iyo bwemejwe, itsinda ryacu rizakwandikira kuri WhatsApp.

slotReasons.leadTime: Hatari kare bihagije — bisaba isaha imwe imbere

contact.title: Twandikire.
contact.subtitle: Twiyumvire, tuhamagare, cyangwa twoherereze ubutumwa bugufi — turi mu byoroshye gusangaho.
contact.formIntro: Gufata, gufata mu matsinda, kureba serivisi za massage, cyangwa kutubwira urakaza — dusubiza vuba kuri WhatsApp.
contact.name: Izina
contact.disclaimer: Ubutumwa bwawe buzafungura mu WhatsApp kugirango tugusubize vuba. Nta byo dubika ku rubuga.

about.heading: Ahantu hato hafite ikaze rinini.
about.pullQuote: The Mall IWACU ni aho mukundira muri Kabeza, Kicukiro — byose mu hamwe.
about.pullSupport: Nimba ufata ibyangombwa bishya, unywa ikinyobwa gikonje muri akabari kacu, urya amafunguro y'i Rwanda atetse iwacu, cyangwa ukiwemerera massage — turabigufashije, byose mu nzu imwe.
about.story1: Twatangije The Mall IWACU kuko abaturage ba Kabeza bakwiriye ahantu hahuza n'uko umunsi nyawo ugenda — kuvana ibyo kurya nimugoroba, kwicara ugaburirwe brochette, gusangira inzoga n'umunyabwoba, hanyuma ukaruhuka mu mwuka mbere yo gutaha.
about.story2: Buri nguni y'inzu ikorwa neza: imbuto twebwe ubwacu twagura, igikoni gitemba uko Abanyarwanda batema iwacu, akabari kazi ibyo ukunda, n'igice cyatuje cya massage n'umwuka iyo ubuzima bukwiriye cyane.
about.story3: Ntabwo turi chain. Turi inguni. Kandi turishimiye ko uri hano.

community.title: Umuryango
community.body: Twubatswe ku baturanyi bacu. Imiranga injira buri munsi nibyo bitubaye.

quality.title: Ubwiza
quality.body: Kuva ku ibibikwa kugeza kuri serivisi — duhitamo ibyiza, buri munsi.

convenience.title: Byoroshye
convenience.body: Serivisi enye, inzu imwe ishyushye. Hagarara incuro imwe, sohoka n'ibyo wose wakeneye.

hospitality.title: Ikaze
hospitality.body: Iwacu bivuga mu rugo — niyo nzira twohereza.

about.ownerNote: Turi ubucuruzi bw'umuryango, twishimiye inguni yacu. Niba hari icyo gishobora kuba cyiza — ifunguro, serivisi, ikimwenyura — turabikubwira. Twumva, kandi turagiza neza.

notFound.subtitle: Iyo paji ntiri kuri meza. Ariko ibindi byose biri mu nzu birafunguye — fata intebe.
